rows.name: Movement of a Spirit
rows.description: Maybe the unchanging surrounding sometimes make us think we forgotten everything, until something happens then we realized what we have forgotten is still hidden in our heart.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Are you awake?  How does it feel like to sleep for 100 years?
rows.talk_end: You lost your memory?  Then rest here for a while.

rows.name: Reiatsu Clash
rows.description: They have no real meaning in life. So seeing two heartless demons fighting make you wonder what are they fighting for.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Jūshirō Ukitake# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS:  Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Jūshirō Ukitake# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go and move around, maybe you'll think of something! Go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Aizen
rows.talk_end: A hollow?  I'll report to the Captain Commander

rows.name: Receive Task
rows.description: You just woken up from a coma and forgotten everything. To find your memory, you listened to the Captain Commander to start working.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Are you feeling better?  We're too busy. You can help us investigate why 13th Division Rukia Kuchiki is living at Human World!
rows.talk_end: Go now! If you have any problem, go find Urahara Shop's owner, he can help you.

rows.name: Go to Human World
rows.description: You can finally leave this boring place and go to the Human World!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Kōtotsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go quickly! I send someone to help you open the Dangai Gate. Go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Kōtotsu
rows.talk_end: So the Captain Commander send you to me. What a rare occasion.

rows.name: Strange Reiatsu
rows.description: At the Human World, while searching for Rukia, you met a boy who can see Shinigami!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Who are you?  Why are you wearing such strange clothes?
rows.talk_end: A strange boy who can see Shinigami?  Wow! To help you continue, take this with you!

rows.name: Mysterious Transfer Student
rows.description: You finally found Rukia. As a Shinigam, she lost her Reiatsu so she became a student in the human's school. To get close to Rukia, you found Urahara Shop's owner and asked him for help. You entered into Rukia's class as a transfer student!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #Confused Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You want to be a student?  Okay, I'll help you. Go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Confused Hollow
rows.talk_end: Take this and report to School.

rows.name: Subsitute Shinigami
rows.description: In a few short days, you became friends with Rukia and told her your true identity. You found out Rukia gave her Reiatsu to Ichigo to rescue his family. So now Ichigo is a Shinigami!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #Elite Beast Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I gave my Shinigami's power to Ichigo, can you help me?  Go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Elite Beast Hollow
rows.talk_end: Thank you. Please help me supervise Ichigo as a Substitute Shinigami!

rows.name: Memory of My Brother
rows.description: A Hollow always come back and attack those closest to them in Human World. Inoue's Brother, as a hollow, wants Inoue's souls. So Rukia and Ichigo saw the Hollow by Inoue and decides to help her!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Sora Inoue
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Do you see the hollow there?  At night, go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Sora Inoue
rows.talk_end: Is that my brother?  That's truly my brother?

rows.name: Memory of Rain
rows.description: June 17th is a dark day for the Kurosaki Family. Ichigo's mother died while protecting Ichigo from a hallow! On this day, Ichigo finally met the Hallow that killed his mother, and he fully showcased his power!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #Camouflage Confused Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: A girl with spiritual power?  Help me by going to the Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Camouflage Confused Hollow
rows.talk_end: This hollow is the one that killed my mother, yet he still got away.

rows.name: Quincy
rows.description: Rukia received the command to kill a Hollow, but we cannot find the Hollow once we arrived. The soul in that area did see a Hallow. Then Ichigo conducted the Konsō on the soul.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Uryū Ishida
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat the Quincy, Uryū Ishida
rows.talk_end: A white clothed men?  It might be a Quincy!

rows.name: Reiatsu Cultivation
rows.description: Go and cultivate Reiatsu once
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: Cultivate #Reiatsu# once
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go and cultivate Reiatsu once

rows.name: Awakening of Power
rows.description: Ichigo received the challenge from Quincy: Uryū Ishida and does not allow you to help. Yet you sense Hollow on another person. After challenging him, you found out from him that in the process of resucing Ichigo's sister, he awakened his power while fighting the Hollow!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Yasutora Sado
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Ichigo decided to go and fight against the Quincy?  He's attracting the Hollows' attention. You can go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Yasutora Sado
rows.talk_end: Yasutora Sado? That's our classmate. You don't know him?

rows.name: Flower and Hollow
rows.description: The alarm you placed by Orihime is sending out signal! To guarantee Orihime's safety, you rush to school and was blocked by a bunch of Hollow. After arriving by Orihime's side, you realized Orihime's power is also awaken!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #Brain-controlled Claw Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami and help Inoue defeat Brain-controlled Claw Hollow
rows.talk_end: I'm fine, it must be power that my brother gave me.

rows.name: Contest Finished
rows.description: You decided to defeat the two guys, then supervise them to kill all the Hollow in Karakura Town!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Damn Ichigo! Go and tell them to stop!
rows.talk_end: If they are not obeying my order, you can punish them.

rows.name: Changed Soul
rows.description: To help Shinigami Ichigo's body move, Rukia purchased "Gikongan" for him. But the Gikongan created problems while Ichigo was out!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #Hollow Assistance Team
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Urahara Shop to pick up my goods, then go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to defeat Hollow Assistance Team
rows.talk_end: Damn Urahara, he lied to me!

rows.name: Soul Battle
rows.description: After Ichigo and others retrun to school, they realized the Gikongan created problem for him. So Ichigo wanted his body back! At the same time, Ichigo received another notice about Hollow, so he had to go kill the Hollow first before getting his body back!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You sure that's Ichigo? But he usually isn't like that!
rows.talk_end: He flirt with another girl when I'm not around.

rows.name: The return of Soul
rows.description: Finally, Ichigo found the Gikongan, but Gikongnan hurt his body already. To get Ichigo's body, you have to fight him!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Gikongnan
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Let's go to Stronghold: Substitute Shinigami to chase away the Kon
rows.talk_end: If I stuff him into a puppet, will he live?

rows.name: Depressed
rows.description: You discovered a Shinigami's reiatsu covered Karakura Town! The Captain Commander discovered Rukia did not return to Seireitei for a long time, so order Byakuya Kuchiki to capture Rukia! How are you and Ichigo going to deal with this Captain?
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Byakuya Kuchiki
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Retsu Unohana# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You are the Shinigami the Captain Commander sent. Tell me where Rukia is at, or else I'll kill you!
rows.talk_end: Your friend is hurt. I have some medicine for your friend.

rows.name: Shinigami's Power
rows.description: You guys lost in the battle against the captain. Ichigo is even more depressed as Byakuya Kuchiki cleared all his Shinigami. You found Urahara Shop's Owner.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Can I still recover my power? Who is Urahara?
rows.talk_end: This is Urahara's shop? It's kind of run down.

rows.name: Zanpakutō's Name
rows.description: Facing your request, Urahara Shop's Owner can only bring all of you to the basement. To help recover Ichigo's power and also help you improve your power, Urahara Shop's Owner decides to battle against everyone.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Kisuke Urahara
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You guys can battle me together. Come to Stronghold: Invading Soul Society to defeat me

rows.name: Zangetsu's chant
rows.description: Urahara asked you to use the Zanpakutō's power and enter into Ichigo's spiritual state to help him. You discovered someone is teaching Ichigo about Zanpakutō's release chant!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Substitute Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Zangetsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Your Zanpakutō should be able to enter another person's internal world. Go to Stronghold: Invading Soul Society to defeat Ichigo's Zangetsu
rows.talk_end: Now you guys have finished training, I'll help you guys enter Soul Society!

rows.name: Continue Forward
rows.description: To rescue Rukia, Urahara found a few support for you: Uryū Ishida, Yasutora Sado, Orihime and a black cat! Urahara Shop's Owner open the Dangai's gate. So all 5 people plus 1 cat starts travelling toward Seireitei!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #Kōtotsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Everyone is here so let's start! Go to Stronghold: Invading Soul Society to defeat Kōtotsu

rows.name: Hakutōmon Guard
rows.description: You guys finally reached the end of the Dangai, yet Kōtotsu kick you guys to Seireitei's Hakutōmon. You guys discovered a huge guy guarding the gate!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Jidanbō Ikkanzaka
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: This is the Soul Society? Seireitei is just behind the gate? Then Rukia should be there. Someone is guarding the gate! Go to Stronghold: Invading Soul Society to defeat Jidanbō Ikkanzaka

rows.name: Smile of Death
rows.description: After the group defeated Jidanbō Ikkanzaka, he agreed to open the Hakutōmon. When the gate is opened, you guys discovered another captain with a devious smile standing by the gate!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Gin Ichimaru
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Thank you for opening the gate, Jidanbō Ikkanzaka. Be careful of the Stronghold: Invading Soul Society's Gin Ichimaru
rows.talk_end: Damn Jidanbō Ikkanzaka! Are you okay?

rows.name: Red Bullet
rows.description: After helping Jidanbō Ikkanzaka, your group left Hakutōmon and was led by Rukongai Elder to a place to stay. You guys met Rukongai's ruffian: a guy riding on a wild boar!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Ganju Shiba
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Some is attacking us. Go defeat Ganju Shiba!
rows.talk_end: I'm not going anywhere. If he comes back again, he's going to say I'm a scaredy cat.

rows.name: Reiatsu Training
rows.description: After resting for a night at Elder's place, the next day you guys started searching for Kūkaku Shiba. You found out that the guy you guys fight last night was Kūkaku's brother, Ganju Shiba. Understanding you guys purpose, Kūkaku arranged for you all to receive Reiryoku training, so to be able to breakthrough the walls of Seireitei!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Yoruichi Shihōin also wants to enter Seireitei?  My sister wants me to help you guys train, take these Reishūkaku and practice with them.
rows.talk_end: You guys are good at using Reishūkaku! Now come and follow me!

rows.name: Breakthrough in the Sky
rows.description: After the Reishi training is done, your team was led to Kūkaku's secret base. Kūkaku is going to use Cannon to shoot everyone over the walls of Seireitei! To control the cannon, Kūkaku wants Ganju Shiba to follow your team into Seireitei!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Next we're using the Kūkaku Cannonball to shoot you guys into Seireitei.
rows.talk_end: You guys control your Reishi! This Reishūkaku will break soon!

rows.name: Separated Team
rows.description: After breaking through the Seireitei walls, because you guys didn't properly controlled the Reishūkaku, everyone landed at different location. You and Yoruichi Shihōin was unfortunate and met the Patrolling Shinigami, you have to battle them quickly.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #Patrolling Assistance Team
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: The Stronghold: Invading Soul Society Patrolling Assistance Team members are chasing us.

rows.name: Arena Battle
rows.description: Challenge Arena!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to #Arena# to challenge #once
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go challenge once in the Arena!

rows.name: Strange Baldy
rows.description: You found Ichigo but also discovered a strange bald guy by him. You started battling this bald guy!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ikkaku Madarame# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Ikkaku Madarame
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: When I'm done, let's go at it.

rows.name: Beautiful Trap
rows.description: Finally you found Ganju Shiba, yet discovered Ganju Shiba in a battle, so you joined the battle to support Ganju Shiba
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Yumichika Ayasegawa
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Help me, go to Stronghold: Invading Soul Society to defeat Yumichika Ayasegawa
rows.talk_end: You are in my trap now!

rows.name: Continue Moving Forward
rows.description: You guys went to find Ichigo yet was attack by a bunch of Shinigami
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #Elite Battling Team
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Striking Seireitei and chase away the Elite Battling Team

rows.name: Tracking Shinigami
rows.description: The three of you finally get together, yet a bunch of Shinigami are attacking you. In the process of hiding from the Shinigami, you guys caught one single Shinigami: Hanatarō
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #Single Shinigami
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Let's go to Stronghold:Striking Seireitei and catch the Single Shinigami
rows.talk_end: Hanatarō? An Shinigami who can only heal? This is so strange.

rows.name: Healing Team
rows.description: After catching Hanatarō, you guys found out from Hanatarō including the healing team, 4th Division. Hanatarō found out you guys are here to rescue Rukia and requested to help you guys!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You know Rukia? No wonder you are willing to heal me.
rows.talk_end: You can help us find Rukia? That's great.

rows.name: Snake Tail's Roar
rows.description: You guys followed Hanatarō and taken a shortcut to Senzaikyū, you met the Shinigami, Renji Abarai!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Renji Abarai
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: This shortcut is great. Go to Stronghold: Striking Seireitei and be careful of Renji Abarai

rows.name: Crazy Person
rows.description: After defeating Renji Abarai, you guys continue forward and met the most powerful Captain of Seireitei, Kenpachi Zaraki!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Kenpachi
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Striking Seireitei to see if it is Kenpachi Zaraki
rows.talk_end: I'll take care of this problem.

rows.name: Renji Abarai's Request
rows.description: After you left Kenpachi and Ichigo, you continue travel to Captain Commander's place. You met Renji Abarai who was healed by the 4th Division.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You have to rescue Rukia!

rows.name: Death of Aizen
rows.description: Because of Aizen's death, you go to Soul Hunt to find the suspect
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Did you know the captain of 5th Division is dead? A group of strange people arrived at Seireitei, go check them out!
rows.talk_end: This is not the criminal. Don't you dare run away!

rows.name: Stealing the Keys
rows.description: After leaving the Captain Commander's place, to rescue Rukia you steal the keys from the Shinigami guarding the Senzaikyū and went to find Ichigo
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #Senzaikyū Guard
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Senzaikyū's keys? It should be on the guard. Go to Stronghold: Striking Seireitei to defeat Senzaikyū Guard and get the keys
rows.talk_end: You did get the keys. Now let's go!

rows.name: The Zangetsu in your heart
rows.description: You find Ichigo and discover that he is lying on the ground. You use the Zanpakutō's power and enter into Ichigo's inner world, but discover Ichigo is already fighting with White Ichigo inside his body!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: White Ichigo
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Use your Zanpakutō to enter into Ichigo's inner world and defeat White Ichigo

rows.name: Yoruichi Shihōin's true form
rows.description: After helping Ichigo, you go to find Yoruichi Shihōin and discover Yoruichi Shihōin is a greate beauty! You give Senzaikyū's key to Yoruichi Shihōin and return to check on Ichigo!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I have to change back to my original shape! Wait for me!
rows.talk_end: Don't be shy. How many cats wear clothes?

rows.name: End of Demon
rows.description: After reaching Ichigo, you discover Kenpachi already removed the eye mask. You work with Ichigo to defeat Kenpachi and his crazy Reiatsu!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kenpachi Zaraki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Invading Soul Society# defeat #BOSS: Shura
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You are this guys aid? You guys can challenge me together.

rows.name: Duel
rows.description: You and Ichigo defeat Kenpachi then rush to Senzaikyū. At the gate of Senzaikyū, Ganju Shiba and Byakuya Kuchiki are battling. Ichigo wants to help but Byakuya Kuchiki defeat you all. Then you and Yoruichi Shihōin rescue Ichigo. Yoruichi Shihōin will train Ichigo for 3 days.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ganju Shiba# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Byakuya Kuchiki is quite powerful. You should be careful!
rows.talk_end: Let's go. You guys cannot defeat Byakuya Kuchiki for now!

rows.name: Bankai Training
rows.description: Yoruichi Shihōin arranges for you to receive Bankai training, but these are useless for you. After partying with girlfriend, you become more powerful.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yoruichi Shihōin# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I'm going to help Ichigo learn Bankai, do you want to learn also?
rows.talk_end: You know Bankai? So the party with your girlfriend helps you?

rows.name: Research Fanatic
rows.description: While training with Ichigo, you suddenly feel the great Reiatsu from Uryū Ishida. When you arrive at the scene, Uryū Ishida is fighting against Nemu Kurotsuchi. By then Uryū Ishida is very weak, you have to go and ask Retsu Unohana to heal Uryū Ishida!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #BOSS: Nemu Kurotsuchi
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Retsu Unohana# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Uryū Ishida is battling with someone? Yoruichi Shihōin does not allow me to leave. You should quickly go to Stronghold:Twinned Punishment to defeat Nemu Kurotsuchi
rows.talk_end: You want me to help Ryoka? Okay, but remember you owe me a favor.

rows.name: Excution Moved Earlier
rows.description: After delivering Uryū Ishida to the 4th Division, you return to the secret base. At that time, Renji Abarai appears and tell you guys Rukia execution date is mvoe forward. He's also going to join you guys for training!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I'm here to train myself!
rows.talk_end: Rukia's punishment time has been move forward. If you cannot rescue her, then I will!

rows.name: Bringing Down the Curtain
rows.description: With the passing of time, Rukia's execution time is drawing near. Renji Abarai leaves the secret base to go to Twinned Punishment, you decides to follow Renji and see if you can delay the execution process.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #BOSS: Byakuya Kuchiki
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Time is almost here. You should go to Stronghold:Twinned Punishment to defeat Byakuya Kuchiki!
rows.talk_end: I'll take care of this problem.

rows.name: Twinned Punishment
rows.description: After leaving Renji Abarai and Byakuya Kuchiki, you quickly rush toward Rukia's execution ground: Sōkyoku Hill!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #Elite Guard
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go quickly to Stronghold: Twinned Punishment to defeat Elite Guard and get back Rukia

rows.name: Realize Promise
rows.description: When you reach Twinned Punishment, Ichigo already arrived also. Ichigo rescues Rukia and gives to Renji Abarai, then turn around and starts battling the lieutenants!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #BOSS: Ōmaeda
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Give Rukia to Renji Abarai. Go to Stronghold: Twinned Punishment and defeat Marechiyo Ōmaeda
rows.talk_end: We're too innocent to wrongly guess of their path.

rows.name: Most Powerful Shinigami
rows.description: Jūshirō Ukitake and Shunsui Kyōraku promise to help you delay Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni, so you can rescue Rukia!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Jūshirō Ukitake# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Shunsui Kyōraku# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shunsui Kyōraku# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: We'll help you delay Captain Commander. Take Rukia with you and go now!
rows.talk_end: You guys have to be careful.

rows.name: Instance: Sneak Attack Human World
rows.description: Go attack Instance: Sneak Attack Human World's Exiled Shinigami
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go attack #Instance: Sneak Attack Human World# #Exiled Shinigami
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Instance: Sneak Attack Human World and defeat Exiled Shinigami!

rows.name: Forge Equipment
rows.description: Go Forge Equipment once.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go #Forge# Equipment# once
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go forge one Equipment!

rows.name: Embed Spirit Stone
rows.description: Go Embed Spirit Stone once.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go #Embed# Spirit Stone# once
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go embed Spirit Stone on Equipment now!

rows.name: Charge toward Sky
rows.description: After rescuing Rukia, Byakuya Kuchiki decides to challenge against you guys
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Byakuya Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #BOSS: Byakuya Kuchiki
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Byakuya Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You want to rescue Rukia? For the glory of my family, I'll send you guys to hell!
rows.talk_end: You guys have such weak Bankai!

rows.name: White Pride
rows.description: Facing such a powerful Ichigo, Byakuya Kuchiki use the most powerful weapon at all: Hakuteiken!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Byakuya Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #BOSS: Hakuteiken
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Byakuya Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: This is the true form of Thousand Cherry Blossoms: Hakuteiken!
rows.talk_end: You guys won. I've never known the true meaning of blood relations…

rows.name: Dangerous ambition
rows.description: After you guys defeated Byakuya Kuchiki and prepare to take Rukia, Aizen suddenly appears and confuses everyone. Facing such a powerful enemies, you guys discuss how to battle to beat Aizen.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to receive the task
rows.guide: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to submit the task
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Hello, Ryoka, you guys can place her down now and retrieve.
rows.talk_end: You Ryoka did a good job.

rows.name: Killed
rows.description: Aizen's plot was revealed and Soul Society returns to normal. You follow Ichigo and others to return to Human World to continue cleaning up Hollow.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Striking Seireitei# defeat #BOSS:  Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You guys think you can defeat me?
rows.talk_end: I'm going to become even more powerful than you guys in the future. Good bye. I'm going to heaven now…

rows.name: Return to Normal
rows.description: One month later, a new transfer student name Shinji Hirako arrives at the school. Very soon, many powerful Hollows appears in the Human World. While you, Ichigo and others are clearing the Hollows, you guys were blocked by the new transfer student: Shinji Hirako!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Collapsing Overture# defeat #Gillian
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: We should return to Human World. Go to Stronghold: Collapsing Overture to defeat Gillian
rows.talk_end: There is a new transfer student and he might join our class.

rows.name: Visored Legion
rows.description: Shinji Hirako says to Ichigo that they are the same type of people. These Holllows are not the regular Hollows, they are Aizen's experment. Shinji is from Visored Legion, not Shinigami nor hollows. Shinji Hirako invites Ichigo to join his legion but Ichigo refuses.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Collapsing Overture# defeat #BOSS: Shinji Hirako
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Hi, does anyone wants to join my Visored Legion? If you can defeat me, then you don't have to join.
rows.talk_end: We are the same type of people, you guys should join us.

rows.name: Arrancar
rows.description: At this time, you guys suddenly discovered a soul battling someone. After beating Shinji Hirako, you leave to help the soul while Ichigo stays to continue battling Shinji Hirako. You find the soul and discovers a Visored-like hollow. You are sneak attack by Hollows and seriously injured!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Collapsing Overture# defeat #Camouflage Confused Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I'll take care of this guy. You go to Stronghold: Collapsing Overture to defeat Camouflage Confused Hollow
rows.talk_end: You were hurt earlier, are you healed now?

rows.name: Collapsing Overture
rows.description: One day, two Arrancars come to find you, Yasutora Sado, and Inoue, and ask about Ichigo's location. When you guys refused to tell them, the Arrancars attack you.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yasutora Sado# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Collapsing Overture# defeat #BOSS: Ulquiorra
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Do you guys want to know where Ichigo is? You have to defeat us first!
rows.talk_end: Don't let them know Ichigo's location, or else he'll be in danger.

rows.name: Revenging Visored
rows.description: The Arrancars are winning the battle and Ichigo arrives. He starts the Hollowfication process!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Spearhead Team Arrives# defeat #BOSS: Ulquiorra
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You can still battle? Then let's go to Stronghold: Spearhead Team Arrives and defeat Ulquiorra

rows.name: Depressing Gathering
rows.description: Rukia and Tōshirō Hitsugaya's Vanguard Team suddenly arrive and discovered your group depressed from Arrancar's attack. Rukia had to think of a way to make everyone recover their fighting spirit.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Spearhead Team Arrives# defeat #Achyukas
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Follow me and go to Stronghold: Spearhead Team Arrives and defeat Achyukas
rows.talk_end: So you finally recovered and want to fight now.

rows.name: Broken Ice Ring
rows.description: You guys suddenly discovered Reiatsu from Arrancars appearing in the Human World. You guys quickly rush to battle the Arrancar. During the process, you suddenly discovered Ichigo in problem, so you decide to go and aid Ichigo!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Spearhead Team Arrives# defeat #BOSS: Fracción
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Spearhead Team Arrives to defeat 6th Fracción
rows.talk_end: You go! I'm worried about Ichigo so I'll stay and take care of things.

rows.name: Destroy All
rows.description: While looking for Ichigo, you met Ikkaku Madarame and discovered him training for Bankai. You cleared the hollows in the area and left to find Ichigo!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ikkaku Madarame# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Visored Legion# defeat #Afinar #6
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ikkaku Madarame# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Don't steal my opponent. You can go to Stronghold: Visored Legion to defeat Afinar #6

rows.name: Devil
rows.description: When you find Ichigo, you also discovered the Arrancar's Reiatsu to be much more powerful than the previous Arrancars
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Visored Legion# defeat #BOSS: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Let's go to Stronghold: Visored Legion to defeat Grimmjow Jeagerjaques
rows.talk_end: Ichigo almost cannot control the White Ichigo in him. If he wants to know how to control, then come and find me!

rows.name: Proof of Power
rows.description: After the crisis is solved, Ichigo disappears. You follow Ichigo's Reiatsu to a warehouse. This is the location of Shinji Hirako's Visored Legion. You stay to help Ichigo.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Visored Legion# defeat #BOSS: Hiyori Sarugaki
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Do you want to join us? If you win, you can join us.
rows.talk_end: Okay, you win. But let's hope Hiyori Sarugaki is fine with this.

rows.name: Complete Hollowfication
rows.description: After receiving approval from Visored Legion members, they decide to help Ichigo with his Visor training. When it is your turn, Ichigo already entered into Hollowfication Status.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Capability Training# defeat #BOSS: King Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Ichigo's training time is almost up. If he is not successful, go and kill him. Go to Stronghold: Capability Training to defeat Bull King Hollow

rows.name: Aizen's Plot
rows.description: Ichigo's Visored training has ended. You also return to Human World to continue killing Hollows. You receive message from Captain Commander that Aizen's final plan is to rebuild The Ōken. Captain Commander wants everyone to be prepared for the final battle in Winter.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Capability Training# defeat #Fanatic Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Let's go to Stronghold: Capability Training to defeat Fanatic Hollow
rows.talk_end: Please start preparing for the final battle against Aizen in winter!

rows.name: Urahara's Decision
rows.description: After receiving news from Captain Commander, for the purpose of raising everyone's battle capabilities, Urahara asked Yoruichi Shihōin to bring you, Inoue and Yasutora Sado to train at Seireitei!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Capability Training# defeat #BOSS: Kōtotsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Capability Training to defeat Kōtotsu. Yoruichi Shihōin is waitng for them.
rows.talk_end: Time to rest and wait until the tiem comes.

rows.name: Hollow Circle
rows.description: It is hard to predict what can happen in one month. Today, you and the Vanguard Team in the Human World are having a meeting in the park, yet was sneak attack by the Arrancars!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry# defeat #BOSS: Wonderweiss
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry and kill Wonderweiss
rows.talk_end: You should leave. I can feel Ichigo's Reiatsu battling already!

rows.name: 11 Second
rows.description: When you reach Ichigo, he is already fighting Grimmjow Jeagerjaques and used hollowfication. Ichigo's hollowfication can only lasts 11 seconds, and will be in grave danger after the status ends. You decide to fight Grimmjow Jeagerjaques to protect Ichigo.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry# defeat #BOSS: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You are here. My hollowfication can only last 11 seconds. During this period, go to Stronghold: The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry and kill Grimmjow Jeagerjaques

rows.name: Young Lady's Thought
rows.description: After the battle ends while walking on the street at night, you discover Inoue sneaking into Ichigo's home and then sneakily leave. Then Inoue follows Arrancar Ulquiorra to enter Hueco Mundo. You want to block then, yet a bunch of hollows block your path.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry# defeat #BOSS: Gillian
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Seireitei tell us that many Hollows appeared within Dangai. Go to the Stronghold: The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry to defeat Gillian Team
rows.talk_end: Inoue went to Hueco Mundo? I need to report to Captain Commander about this! Captain Commander wants us to return to Seireitei to wait for the final battle. You guys are not allowed to go rescue Inoue.

rows.name: Passing through Garganta
rows.description: After the Vanguard Team returns to Seireitei, you did not return. Ichigo comes find you and ask about how to enter Hueco Mundo. You ask Ichigo to follow you, and brought Ichigo to Urahara Shop's basement.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry# defeat #BOSS: Arrancar
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: The Hueco Mundo Sneak Entry and kill the Guarding Arrancar
rows.talk_end: This is Hueco Mundo? It's not very different from Human World.

rows.name: Underground Labyrinth
rows.description: When you and the others finally pass Garganta and arrives at Hueco Mundo, you find yourself in an underground Forest of Menos and a group of enemies appears!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Dessert of Hueco Mondo# defeat #BOSS: Forest of Menos Guard
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Uryū Ishida# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: This damn Forest of Menos is filled with traps and more enemies are coming. Go to Stronghold: Dessert of Hueco Mondo to defeat Forest of Menos Guard
rows.talk_end: Most of Hueco Mundo is covered with dessert. Is that the Las Noches? Let's go.

rows.name: Nel Tu
rows.description: While running toward Las Noches, your group is picked up by a surprising tornado. When your group finally lands, you see a group of Arrancar chasing after a little girl.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Dessert of Hueco Mondo# defeat #BOSS: Sand Bug's Sting
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Uryū Ishida# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Why are there other humans in Hueco Mundo? Go to Stronghold: Dessert of Hueco Mondo to defeat Pesche Guatiche and rescue the girl

rows.name: Dessert Guard
rows.description: While you guys are trying to battle Arrancar Nel Tu, a guard appears in the desert. The name is Runuganga, and your physical attack cannot hurt it.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Dessert of Hueco Mondo# defeat #BOSS: Runuganga
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Nel Tu says this dessert is guard by Runuganga. Go and defeat Runuganga.
rows.talk_end: After we reach Las Noches, how do you guys prepare to enter?

rows.name: Promise at the Gate
rows.description: After long tracks, you guys finally reaches the gate of Las Noches. But what you guys see is 5 different entrances rather than one.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Dessert of Hueco Mondo# defeat #BOSS: Forest Guard
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Dessert of Hueco Mondo to defeat Forest Guard
rows.talk_end: Should we split up to try the different entrance?

rows.name: Giralda
rows.description: After making promises, you guys continue and you follow Ichigo, but Nel Tu also joins you. Then an Arrancar sneak attacks. While taking with this Arrancar, you guys found out this Arrancar was eliminated from Espada. He is Giralda!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Forest of Menos # defeat #BOSS: Dordoni Alessandro Del Socaccio
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Let's travel together. Who's over there? You can go to Stronghold: Forest of Menos and defeat Dordoni Alessandro Del Socaccio
rows.talk_end: I'll deal with this dude. Now that we've reach this far, we have to bring Inoue back.

rows.name: Golondrina
rows.description: After leaving Ichigo, you arrive at a room filled with pillars. A woman standing on top one of the pillars is attacking Uryū Ishida and Pesche Guatiche. Even though you don't know why those two people are here together, you know that lady is an enemy for sure.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Uryū Ishida# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Forest of Menos # defeat #BOSS: Cirucci Thunderwitch
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Uryū Ishida# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go help me delay Stronghold: Forest of Menos Cirucci Thunderwitch
rows.talk_end: Let's split up to the different road.

rows.name: Continuous Evolution
rows.description: After assisting Uryū Ishida defeat Cirucci Thunderwitch, you and Uryū Ishida decide to split up and travel down different tunnel. Soon, you reach the inside of Las Noches yet was quite surprise at the site: there is blue sky and the sun inside Las Noches!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Forest of Menos # defeat #BOSS: Aaroniero Arruruerie
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Be careful of Stronghold: Forest of Menos' Aaroniero Arruruerie; he tricked us here.
rows.talk_end: This is my battle! You go find Inoue!

rows.name: Devil's Left Wrist
rows.description: You left behind Rukia and try to observe Las Noches. Then the wall behind you starts to shake and suddenly exploded!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yasutora Sado# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Forest of Menos # defeat #BOSS: Gantenbainne Mosqueda
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yasutora Sado# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Be careful of Stronghold: Forest of Menos' Gantenbainne Mosqueda, he's a former Espada.
rows.talk_end: Are you lost? Be careful of the traps…

rows.name: Research Specialist
rows.description: You fall into a trap while helping Yasutora Sado. You slide own a long tunnel into a large and bright room.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Appears# defeat #BOSS: Szayelaporro Granz
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Renji Abarai# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Be careful, Szayelaporro Granz has many Fracción!
rows.talk_end: You can go first. Trust me, I'll catch up!

rows.name: Continue progress
rows.description: Leaving Renji Abarai, you start walking around in Las Noches to find Inoue.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Appears# defeat #Guarding Arrancar
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Did you find out Inoue's location? Not yet. Let's split up! Be careful of Stronghold: Espada Appears to defeat Guarding Arrancar

rows.name: The King's Claw
rows.description: Just as you find Inoue, you meet an Espada that you have met in Human World before: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques. Grimmjow Jeagerjaques says if you can defeat him, he'll tell you where is Inoue.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Appears# defeat #BOSS: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Let's go different direction! We have to bring Inoue back! Be careful of Grimmjow Jeagerjaques
rows.talk_end: What? You met Grimmjow Jeagerjaques! Where?

rows.name: Blockage
rows.description: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques suddenly stops in the midst of battle, stating you are not worthy to be his opponent. Then he tells you Inoue's location and leaves.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Appears# defeat #BOSS: Shadow Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: He left and told you Inoue's location?! Go to Stronghold: Espada Appears and defeat Shadow Hollow

rows.name: Arrancar's Bullying
rows.description: You finally reaches the place that Grimmjow Jeagerjaques mentioned, but another person has reach there first.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Death of Ichigo# defeat #BOSS: Twin
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You are here to rescue me? Be careful of Stronghold: Death of Ichigo's Twin Fracción
rows.talk_end: You want to take me back!

rows.name: Death of Ichigo
rows.description: Just as you rescue Inoue, Grimmjow Jeagerjaques appears and state that Ichigo has being killed. You need to bring Inoue to heal Ichigo. You had to follow Grimmjow Jeagerjaques to heal Ichigo. Grimmjow Jeagerjaques wants to rescue Ichigo just battle Ichigo
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Death of Ichigo# defeat #Chaos Arrancar
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques, Ichigo is dead? No way! Let's go around Stronghold: Death of Ichigo's Chaos Arrancarand go find Ichigo
rows.talk_end: Ichigo is dead? No…Ichigo cannot die!

rows.name: Caja Negación
rows.description: While Inoue was healing Ichigo, Ulquiorra suddenly appears.  Grimmjow Jeagerjaques works with you to use Caja Negación to seal Ulquiorra…
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Death of Ichigo# defeat #BOSS: Ulquiorra
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Ichigo will not die! You need to be careful of Stronghold: Death of Ichigo's Ulquiorra
rows.talk_end: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques, why are you helping us? Why did you seal Ulquiorra?

rows.name: Guardian Outside
rows.description: After Inoue heals Ichigo, Ichigo and Grimmjow starts fighting. Ichigo tells you to guard Inoue to prevent Arrancar from sneaking in
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Death of Ichigo# defeat #BOSS: Guard
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Grimmjow Jeagerjaques, let's go! You are responsible for Inoue. Go to Stronghold: Death of Ichigo to defeat Guard and protect her from danger.

rows.name: Santa Teresa
rows.description: Finally, Ichigo and Grimmjow Jeagerjaques's battle ended and Ichigo wins. Grimmjow Jeagerjaques refuses to accept this result, but he's very weak already. As you are about to go rescue Rukia and Renji Abarai, Grimmjow Jeagerjaques was hit by a strange knife!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Death of Ichigo# defeat #BOSS: Nnoitra Gilga
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Aren't you also an Espada? You need to be careful of Stronghold: Death of Ichigo's Nnoitra Gilga

rows.name: Gamuza
rows.description: In the process of protecting everyone else, you are seriously hurt. Nel Tu changed from a little kid to a curvaceous woman. While everyone is very confused, Santa Teresa tells everyone the anser
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle Fury# defeat #BOSS: Santa Teresa
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Nel Tu? Are you a member of Espada? Go and help Nel Tu at Stronghold: Battle Fury to defeat Santa Teresa
rows.talk_end: Nel Tu, I believe in you. You would not betray us.

rows.name: Battle Fury
rows.description: Just as Nel Tu is about to defeat #5, Nel Tu's body becomes a child once again. Everyone is controlled by #8. In this dangerous moment, Kenpachi suddenly appears in front of everyone and battles #8.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kenpachi Zaraki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle Fury# defeat #The Exequias
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kenpachi Zaraki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You go to Stronghold:Battle Fury and kill The Exequias

rows.name: Everyone Gathers
rows.description: Finally, Kenpachi's battle against #5 ends, and Ichigo is healed. Just as Inoue is about to heal Kenpachi, the Arrancar suddenly appears and steals away Inoue. To rescue her, you and Ichigo charges toward the #5 Tower.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle Fury# defeat #BOSS: Runuganga
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: We will chase after Inoue! Be careful of Stronghold: Battle Fury's Runuganga
rows.talk_end: Damn, so many hollows in this area!

rows.name: Skull Tree
rows.description: When you and Ichigo reaches the wall, the Exequias appears and blocks you guys. While Ichigo continues to go rescue Inoue, you stop to block the Exequias.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle Fury# defeat #BOSS: Rudbornn Chelute
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Rukia Kuchiki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Everyone's here. Let's create a path for Ichigo! Go to Stronghold: Battle Fury to defeat Rudbornn Chelute

rows.name: Sneak Attack
rows.description: You eliminates the Exequias and quickly goes to meet up with Ichigo. You discovered #10 becomes #0 and prepares to sneak attack while Ichigo and Ulquiorra are battling. To help Ichigo, you will try to kill #0. Ichigo is lead by Ulquiorra to go above the sky!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Uryū Ishida# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle in the Sky# defeat #BOSS: Yammy
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Isn't that Human World's Yammy, does he wants to sneak attack Ichigo? Go to Stronghold: Battle in the Sky and defeat Yammy

rows.name: Go to the Sky
rows.description: After you kill #0 Yammy, you find Inoue. She requests that you bring her to Ichigo. After considering, you take Inoue with you, but a bunch of Hollows try to block you.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle in the Sky# defeat #Sky Exploding hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Can you deliver me to the sky? Be careful of Stronghold: Battle in the Sky's Sky Exploding hollow
rows.talk_end: Why are there so many hollows in the wall?

rows.name: Above the Sky
rows.description: You and Inoue reach above the sky. You try to join the battle against Ulquiorra, but discovers Ulquiorra is blocking you. You had to stay by Inoue and protect her.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle in the Sky# defeat #BOSS: Visored
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Carefully guard Inoue! Be careful of Stronghold: Battle in the Sky's Hollow Visored

rows.name: Resurrección: Segunda Etapa
rows.description: Ulquiorra release the most powerful move - Resurrección: Segunda Etapa; this skill is unique to him and no other Espada has this power. After Ulquiorra uses Resurrección: Segunda Etapa, he can kill Ichigo easily. Then he wants to take Inoue away, so you had to battle him!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle in the Sky# defeat #BOSS: Murciélago
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Be careful of Stronghold:Battle in the Sky's Murciélago
rows.talk_end: Ichigo! How could this happen? Usually when Ichigo is wearing Visored, he's always wins.

rows.name: Del Toro
rows.description: While you are fighting Ulquiorra, Inoue's scream awakens Ichigo. Ichigo's appearance has changed: he has hollow-like shell on his skin and 2 horns on his head. He uses his instinct to battle Ulquiorra.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Orihime Inoue# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Battle in the Sky# defeat #BOSS: Del Toro
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Ichigo!Ichigo! Help me! Go to Stronghold: Battle in the Sky and defeat Del Toro, rescue Ichigo!

rows.name: Return to Human World
rows.description: Finally the battle at Hueco Mundo temporarily ends, you and Ichigo passes through Garganta and leaves Hueco Mundo, then you find out the 4th Division Captain Retsu Unohana also wants to go to Human World.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Retsu Unohana# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Kekkai's Pillar# defeat #Garganta Thunderbolt
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Retsu Unohana# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Your back! Let's return to the Human World! Human World is your battlefield!
rows.talk_end: You can go find Captain Commander! I'm going to heal other people!

rows.name: Guarding Kekkai's Pillar
rows.description: After the 3 people arrives in Human World, Captain Commander gives a task: Guard Kekkai's Pillar! As soon as you reach Kekkai's Pillar, you see a group of Arrancars by the pillars.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Kekkai's Pillar# defeat #BOSS: #2 Fracción
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Izuru Kira# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go and defend Kekkai's Pillar! If the Arrancar breaks it, the entire Karakura Town will be gone! Go to Stronghold: Kekkai's Pillar to defeat #2 Fracción
rows.talk_end: Good job in protecting the pillar!

rows.name: Kekkai collapses
rows.description: After defeating the Arrancars, you discover one pillar is broken. You follow the captain and others to battle Espada!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Izuru Kira# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Kekkai's Pillar# defeat #Green Demon Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Ikkaku Madarame was defeated and his pillar breaks! Go to Stronghold: Kekkai's Pillar and assist the Captain to defeat Green Demon Hollow

rows.name: Death Sigh
rows.description: You assist Captain Sui-Feng to fight #2 Espada and discovers his power is greater than expected. Luckily, Sui-Feng uses Jakuhō Raikōben and defeat it!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Kekkai's Pillar# defeat #BOSS: Baraggan Louisenbairn
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Captain Sui-Feng is battling #2 Arrancar. Go to Stronghold: Kekkai's Pillar and help defeat Baraggan Louisenbairn
rows.talk_end: Captain Sui-Feng is in Bankai form. Okay, now you are free to move around!

rows.name: Hyōten Hyakkasō
rows.description: Next, you go to help Tōshirō Hitsugaya battle #3 Espada. Then Tōshirō Hitsugaya uses the Hyōrinmaru's power plus Hyōten Hyakkasō to freeze it!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Moment of Parting# defeat #BOSS: Tier Harribel
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: The Moment of Parting and help me delay Tier Harribel

rows.name: Wonderweiss
rows.description: After you guys defeat the Espada, a great Garganta appears in the Human World. In the Garganta is a childish looking Hollow. The child screems and breaks Tōshirō Hitsugaya's Hyōten Hyakkasō!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Shunsui Kyōraku# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Moment of Parting# defeat #BOSS: Wonderweiss
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shunsui Kyōraku# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: That's Garganta! Are more people coming to aid the Arrancar? Go to Stronghold: The Moment of Parting to defeat Wonderweiss
rows.talk_end: Next, w'ere meeting the big guns.

rows.name: Resurrected Espada
rows.description: With the help from Wonderweiss, the #2 and #3 Espada revives again. In this urgent moment, the Visored Legion arrives to help the Shinigami!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Moment of Parting# defeat #King of Hueco Mundo
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: He is helping two Arrancars! Go to the Stronghold: The Moment of Parting and help me defeat King of Hueco Mundo
rows.talk_end: Don't worry! This time we're not Shinigami's enemies.

rows.name: The Moment of Parting
rows.description: Aizen and his team uses Wonderweiss' ability to break through Captain Commander's flames and charges at you guys. You receive order from Captain Commander to assist in fighting Kaname Tōsen!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Moment of Parting# defeat #BOSS: Kaname Tōsen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shūhei Hisagi# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I can deal with the problem here. You go to Stronghold:The Moment of Parting and defeat Kaname Tōsen
rows.talk_end: Captain Tosen, why did you rebel against Soul Society?

rows.name: False Crown
rows.description: After deafeating Kaname Tōsen you join the Visored Legion's Sui-Feng and others using Kekkai and Bankai to defeat #2 Espada. Before he dies, the #2 Espada throws his weapons at Aizen and wants to drag Aizen into hell!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Hachigen Ushōda# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Showdown# defeat #BOSS: Baraggan Louisenbairn
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Hachigen Ushōda# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Espada Showdown to defeat Baraggan Louisenbairn
rows.talk_end: I'm going to break his arms and his legs.

rows.name: Sacrificial Chain
rows.description: After defeating #2, you help Tōshirō Hitsugaya battle #3, suddenly Aizen appears and hurt #3!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Showdown# defeat #BOSS: Tier Harribel
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: #3 Espada! I can't believe you're not dead yet! Go to Stronghold: Espada Showdown and help me defeat Tier Harribel

rows.name: Years of Hatred
rows.description: Visored Legion's Hiyori Sarugaki, filled with hatred, charges toward Aizen, yet you guys are blocked by Arrancars and cannot help
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Espada Showdown# defeat #BOSS:  Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Hiyori Sarugaki, don't be foolish! Go to Stronghold: Espada Showdown and help me defeat Aizen
rows.talk_end: Hiyori Sarugaki, I'll not let you die! Where is Orihime?

rows.name: Protecting Everyone
rows.description: You are in charge of guarding the partners who are hurt from Arrancars attack
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Aizen Join The War# defeat #Sneak Attack Fracción
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I'll deal with this now! Go to Stronghold: Aizen Join The War to defeat Sneak Attack Fracción

rows.name: Refrained Shikai
rows.description: After Hiyori Sarugaki was hurt by Aizen, Shinji Hirako cannot forgive himself for unable to assist Hiyori Sarugaki. Facing his formal Lieutenant, Aizen, Shinji Hirako used a Shikai that Aizen has never seen before.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Aizen Join The War# defeat #BOSS: Kyōka Suigetsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Shinji Hirako# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Aizen! Time for us to have a final fight to death! Help me at Stronghold: Aizen Join The War to defeat Kyōka Suigetsu
rows.talk_end: What? How can you be so fast!

rows.name: Angry Blade
rows.description: While Shinji Hirako is battling with Aizen, Tōshirō Hitsugaya's internal hatred also continue to expand. He hold his Zanpakutō and charge toward Aizen, at the same time you continue to battle Arrancars.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Aizen Join The War# defeat #BOSS: Chrysalis Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Tōshirō Hitsugaya# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Aizen! Time for you to die! Help me at Stronghold: Aizen Join The War to defeat Chrysalis Aizen
rows.talk_end: Why did it become like this…

rows.name: Arrancar Army
rows.description: Facing everyone, Aizen scornfully laughs and swings his hand to summon the Arrancar Army and charge toward everyone.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Enter! The World of the Shinigami# defeat #King of Arrancar
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Now I'm above both Hollows and Shinigami!
rows.talk_end: We're not the same level anymore…

rows.name: Sealed Fire
rows.description: Captain Commander use his Zanpakutō: Ryūjin Jakka, and instantly kills a bunch of Arrancars. Aizen sees this and use Wonderweiss' power to seal Captain Commander's power.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Enter! The World of the Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Wonderweiss
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You can seal my Zanpakutō! Come to Stronghold: Enter! The World of the Shinigami and help me defeat Wonderweiss

rows.name: Shop Owner Appears
rows.description: Facing Aizen, no one knows what to do. At this time the Urahara Shop's Owner appears and use Kido to hurt Aizen, greatly inspiring everyone else!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Enter! The World of the Shinigami# defeat #BOSS: Hollowed Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Go to Stronghold: Enter! The World of the Shinigami to defeat Hollowed Aizen
rows.talk_end: Urahara! I can control Hōgyoku. You guys cannot kill me. Let's go to the real Karakura Town!

rows.name: Go to Seireitei
rows.description: The people who join the battle late: Isshin Kurosaki, Yoruichi Shihōin and Urahara are all defeated by Aizen. Aizen opens the Senkaimon and enter into Soul Society's real Karakura Town. Isshin Kurosaki also leads Ichigo and enter Seireitei.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Final Moon Fang Heaven-Piercer# defeat #Kōtotsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Quickly open the Senkaimon!! After entering, protect yourself from sneak attack!

rows.name: Dangai cultivation
rows.description: After the group enters Dangai, you discover the Kōtotsu already disappeared. Ichigo states there is no way he can win against Aizen, yet Isshin Kurosaki tells Ichigo if Ichigo can learn Saigo no Getsuga Tenshō, he can defeat Aizen. Isshin also uses Dangai to train Ichigo!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Final Moon Fang Heaven-Piercer# defeat #BOSS: Tensa Zangetsu
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I'm going to Zangetsu to learn Saigo no Getsuga Tenshō, you are in charge here! Go to Stronghold: The Final Moon Fang Heaven-Piercer to defeat Tensa Zangetsu
rows.talk_end: Great! Time for us to go!

rows.name: Real Karakura Town
rows.description: When everyone reaches the true Karakura Town, you discover everyone is sleeping. Then many Hollows appear, so you guys have to defeat these hollows before you can go block Aizen
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Final Moon Fang Heaven-Piercer# defeat #Soul-Eating Arrancar
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Karakura Town's citizen are all hypnotized by Urahara Shop's Owner. The Hollow summon by Aizen is destroying the surrounding, we need to take care of it first. Go to Stronghold: The Final Moon Fang Heaven-Piercer to defeat Soul-Eating Arrancar
rows.talk_end: Now it's time for us to go find Aizen!

rows.name: Saigo no Getsuga Tenshō
rows.description: When everyone reaches Aizen, you find Rangiku Matsumoto crying by Gin's side. Gin joined Aizen for Rangiku Matsumoto, yet he failed and was killed by Aizen. Ichigo's fury exploded!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #The Final Moon Fang Heaven-Piercer# defeat #BOSS: Hōgyoku Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Aizen! This is your max power? Time for you to witness Saigo no Getsuga Tenshō!
rows.talk_end: Is it time to end it?

rows.name: Evolve to Higher Level
rows.description: Just as Ichigo successfully limited Aizen, Aizen uses the Hōgyoku and evolves again!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Ultimate Valley# defeat #Hōgyoku's Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Aizen! That's it…

rows.name: Mugetsu
rows.description: Ichigo calmly watches the evolved Aizen, and decides to improve his own power again。
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Ultimate Valley# defeat #Six-wings Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Time for you to witness great power…

rows.name: Final Resistance
rows.description: Aizen, in a final attempt to resist, charges toward Ichigo!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Aizen# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #Ultimate Valley# defeat #Final Aizen
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Are you guys afraid now?

rows.name: Seal Activated
rows.description: Ichigo uses Mugetsu to seriously injures Aizen, and Kisuke Urahara charges into Aizen's body and activates sealing!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #End of the Great Battle# defeat #Sealed Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: The seal inside Aizen's body is activated. Go and eliminated the hollows in this area.
rows.talk_end: Aizen's sealed pillar will be sent back to Seireitei, you can stay here with Ichigo.

rows.name: After the Battle
rows.description: The battle finally ends, your job is to assist everyone to clear the battlefield.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #End of the Great Battle# defeat #Remaining Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: The battle already ended. Your job is to clear the battleground!
rows.talk_end: We're going to transfer Karakura Town back to the Human World.

rows.name: New Guardian
rows.description: The battle ends and everyone's life returns to normal. You received a new order from Captain Commander to become the new Guard for Karakura Town.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #End of the Great Battle# defeat #Troublemaking Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: You are appointed as the new guard of Karakura Town.
rows.talk_end: You are in charge of Karakura Town.

rows.name: Another Substitute Badge
rows.description: It's one year since the great battle against Aizen and Ichigo's Reiatsu disappeared. One day, a man with Reiatsu appears. After Ichigo helps him, he discovered the man also owns Substitute Shinigami Badge!
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #New Karakura Town# defeat #Lost Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: Are the Shinigami's doing there job properly?

rows.name: Uryū Ishida receives sneak attack
rows.description: One day, while you were wandering in Karakura Town, you suddenly feels Uryū Ishida's Reiatsu wave moves violently then slowly become weaker.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Kisuke Urahara# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #New Karakura Town# defeat #Road-blocking Hollow
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Uryū Ishida# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: As Karakura Town's guard, you cannot be lazy!
rows.talk_end: I don't know who sneak attack me…

rows.name: Fullbring appears
rows.description: After Uryū Ishida was atack, it seems like the entire Karakura Town is firmly grip by a black glove. So Ichigo Kurosaki find Kūgo Ginjō and request him to help Ichigo recover his power.
rows.guide_before: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to receive the task
rows.guide: At the Stronghold: #New Karakura Town# defeat #Fullbringer
rows.guide_end: Go to the Main City and find #Ichigo Kurosaki# to submit the task
rows.talk_before: I need to regain my power to protect those people around me!

rows.name: Substitute Badge's power
rows.description: At Kūgo Ginjō's place, Ichigo Kurosaki listens to Kūgo Ginjō's guidance and feels the power of the Substitute Badge!
